allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'feat: initialisation projet Next.js pour Vercel' --body ' *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); versions=[v for v in d['versions'].keys\(\) if v.startswith\('15.'\)]; print\(sorted\(versions\)[-5:]\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) stable=[v for v in d['versions'].keys\(\) if v.startswith\('15.'\) and 'canary' not in v and 'beta' not in v and 'rc' not in v] from packaging.version import Version print\(sorted\(stable, key=Version\)[-5:]\) ")
